monster.name: Ancient Test Dragon
monster.speed: walk 40 ft., burrow 30 ft., climb 40 ft., fly 80 ft. (hover), swim 40 ft.
monster.resist: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
monster.senses: blindsight 60 ft., darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 26

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
trait.text: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

action.name: Multiattack
action.text: The dragon can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

action.name: Bite
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d10 + 8) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

action.name: Frightful Presence (Recharge 5-6)
action.text: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 21 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

legendary.name: Detect
legendary.text: The dragon makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.

legendary.name: Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions)
legendary.text: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 15 feet of the dragon must succeed on a DC 22 Dexterity saving throw or take 15 (2d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone.

monster.name: Test Golem
monster.immune: poison, psychic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks that aren't adamantine
monster.conditionImmune: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned
monster.languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

action.name: Slam
action.text: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Ballista
action.text: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 120/480 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d10) piercing damage.
